entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: The primary cereal crop studied for productivity and sustainability in Northwest India

entities.name: NORTHWEST INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the wheat farms are located

entities.name: ECONOMIC AND ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The goal of maintaining crop production without depleting resources or harming the environment

entities.name: MULTICRITERIA INTEGRATED ASSESSMENT
entities.description: A data-driven approach used to evaluate multiple sustainability indicators for wheat farms

entities.name: YIELD GAP
entities.description: The difference between the potential yield and the actual yield achieved

entities.name: NITROGEN-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A measure of the efficiency with which nitrogen fertilizer is converted into crop yield

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The economic return of wheat production based on input-output amounts and prices

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: The amount of CO2-equivalent gases released during wheat production

entities.name: STOCHASTIC FRONTIER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to identify the causes of yield gaps

entities.name: SIMULATED POTENTIAL YIELD
entities.description: Data used in combination with stochastic frontier analysis to determine yield gaps

entities.name: MITIGATION OPTIONS TOOL
entities.description: A tool used to quantify greenhouse gas emissions

entities.name: TOPSIS
entities.description: The Technique for Order of Preference by Similarity to Ideal Solution used for multicriteria assessment

entities.name: RANDOM FOREST
entities.description: A machine learning algorithm used to identify important management practices

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY YIELD GAP
entities.description: The portion of the yield gap attributed to the available technology

entities.name: TILLAGE INTENSITY
entities.description: The frequency and depth of soil tillage operations

entities.name: N APPLICATION RATE
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen fertilizer applied to the wheat crop

entities.name: ZERO TILLAGE
entities.description: A farming practice that eliminates tillage to improve sustainability

entities.name: RESIDUE RETENTION
entities.description: The practice of leaving crop residues on the field to minimize emissions

entities.name: CROP ESTABLISHMENT METHOD
entities.description: The technique used to plant the crop, specifically for the preceding rice crop

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop grown before wheat in the cropping system
